    2240             : 
    2241             : // rtreeValueDown() / rtreeValueUp() come from SQLite3 source code
    2242             : // SQLite3 RTree stores min/max values as float. So do the same for our
    2243             : // GPKGRTreeEntry
    2244             : 
    2245             : /*
    2246             : ** Rounding constants for float->double conversion.
    2247             : */
    2248             : #define RNDTOWARDS (1.0 - 1.0 / 8388608.0) /* Round towards zero */
    2249             : #define RNDAWAY (1.0 + 1.0 / 8388608.0)    /* Round away from zero */
    2250             : 
    2251             : /*
    2252             : ** Convert an sqlite3_value into an RtreeValue (presumably a float)
    2253             : ** while taking care to round toward negative or positive, respectively.
    2254             : */
    2255     1786020 : static float rtreeValueDown(double d)
    2256             : {
    2257     1786020 :     float f = static_cast<float>(d);
    2258     1786020 :     if (f > d)
    2259             :     {
    2260       70050 :         f = static_cast<float>(d * (d < 0 ? RNDAWAY : RNDTOWARDS));
    2261             :     }
    2262     1786020 :     return f;
    2263             : }
    2264             : 
    2265     1786020 : static float rtreeValueUp(double d)
    2266             : {
    2267     1786020 :     float f = static_cast<float>(d);
    2268     1786020 :     if (f < d)
    2269             :     {
    2270       69979 :         f = static_cast<float>(d * (d < 0 ? RNDTOWARDS : RNDAWAY));
    2271             :     }
    2272     1786020 :     return f;
    2273             : }

    2656             : /************************************************************************/
    2657             : /*                          StartAsyncRTree()                           */
    2658             : /************************************************************************/
    2659             : 
    2660             : // We create a temporary database with only the RTree, and we insert
    2661             : // records into it in a dedicated thread, in parallel of the main thread
    2662             : // that inserts rows in the user table. When the layer is finalized, we
    2663             : // just use bulk copy statements of the form
    2664             : // INSERT INTO rtree_xxxx_rowid/node/parent SELECT * FROM
    2665             : // temp_rtree.my_rtree_rowid/node/parent to copy the RTree auxiliary tables into
    2666             : // the main database, which is a very fast operation.
    2667             : 
    2668          24 : void OGRGeoPackageTableLayer::StartAsyncRTree()
    2669             : {
    2670          24 :     m_osAsyncDBName = m_poDS->GetDescription();
    2671          24 :     m_osAsyncDBName += ".tmp_rtree_";
    2672          24 :     bool bCanUseTableName = false;
    2673          24 :     if (strlen(m_pszTableName) <= 32)
    2674             :     {
    2675          18 :         bCanUseTableName = true;
    2676          18 :         constexpr char DIGIT_ZERO = '0';
    2677          72 :         for (int i = 0; m_pszTableName[i] != '\0'; ++i)
    2678             :         {
    2679          60 :             const char ch = m_pszTableName[i];
    2680          66 :             if (!((ch >= 'a' && ch <= 'z') || (ch >= 'A' && ch <= 'Z') ||
    2681           6 :                   (ch >= DIGIT_ZERO && ch <= '9') || ch == '.' || ch == '_'))
    2682             :             {
    2683           6 :                 bCanUseTableName = false;
    2684           6 :                 break;
    2685             :             }
    2686             :         }
    2687             :     }
    2688          24 :     if (bCanUseTableName)
    2689          12 :         m_osAsyncDBName += m_pszTableName;
    2690             :     else
    2691             :     {
    2692          12 :         m_osAsyncDBName += CPLMD5String(m_pszTableName);
    2693             :     }
    2694          24 :     m_osAsyncDBName += ".db";
    2695             : 
    2696          24 :     m_osAsyncDBAttachName = "temp_rtree_";
    2697          24 :     m_osAsyncDBAttachName += CPLMD5String(m_pszTableName);
    2698             : 
    2699          24 :     VSIUnlink(m_osAsyncDBName.c_str());

    2872             :     }

    2876             :     }

    2880             : /************************************************************************/
    2881             : /*                      AsyncRTreeThreadFunction()                      */
    2882             : /************************************************************************/
    2883             : 
    2884          24 : void OGRGeoPackageTableLayer::AsyncRTreeThreadFunction()
    2885             : {
    2886          24 :     const size_t nMaxRAMUsageAllowed = GetMaxRAMUsageAllowedForRTree();
    2887          24 :     sqlite3_stmt *hStmt = nullptr;
    2888          24 :     GIntBig nCount = 0;
    2889             :     while (true)
    2890             :     {
    2891         642 :         const auto aoEntries = m_oQueueRTreeEntries.get_and_pop_front();
    2892         642 :         if (aoEntries.empty())
    2893          24 :             break;
    2894             : 
    2895         618 :         constexpr int NOTIFICATION_INTERVAL = 500 * 1000;
    2896             : 
    2897         618 :         auto oIter = aoEntries.begin();
    2898         618 :         if (m_hRTree)
    2899             :         {
    2900        2404 :             for (; oIter != aoEntries.end(); ++oIter)
    2901             :             {
    2902        2186 :                 const auto &entry = *oIter;
    2903        2186 :                 if (gdal_sqlite_rtree_bl_ram_usage(m_hRTree) >
    2904        4368 :                         nMaxRAMUsageAllowed ||
    2905        2182 :                     !gdal_sqlite_rtree_bl_insert(m_hRTree, entry.nId,
    2906        2182 :                                                  entry.fMinX, entry.fMinY,
    2907        2182 :                                                  entry.fMaxX, entry.fMaxY))
    2908             :                 {
    2909           4 :                     CPLDebug("GPKG", "Too large in-memory RTree. "
    2910             :                                      "Flushing it and using memory friendly "
    2911             :                                      "algorithm for the rest");
    2912           4 :                     if (!FlushInMemoryRTree(m_hAsyncDBHandle, "my_rtree"))
    2913           0 :                         return;
    2914           4 :                     break;
    2915             :                 }
    2916        2182 :                 ++nCount;
    2917        2182 :                 if ((nCount % NOTIFICATION_INTERVAL) == 0)
    2918             :                 {
    2919           0 :                     CPLDebug("GPKG", CPL_FRMT_GIB " rows indexed in rtree",
    2920             :                              nCount);
    2921             :                 }
    2922             :             }
    2923         222 :             if (oIter == aoEntries.end())
    2924         218 :                 continue;
    2925             :         }
    2926             : 
    2927         400 :         if (hStmt == nullptr)
    2928             :         {
    2929           4 :             const char *pszInsertSQL =
    2930             :                 "INSERT INTO my_rtree VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)";
    2931           4 :             if (sqlite3_prepare_v2(m_hAsyncDBHandle, pszInsertSQL, -1, &hStmt,
    2932           4 :                                    nullptr) != SQLITE_OK)
    2933             :             {
    2934           0 :                 CPLError(CE_Failure, CPLE_AppDefined,
    2935             :                          "failed to prepare SQL: %s", pszInsertSQL);
    2936           0 :                 m_oQueueRTreeEntries.clear();
    2937           0 :                 m_bErrorDuringRTreeThread = true;
    2938           0 :                 return;
    2939             :             }
    2940             : 
    2941           4 :             SQLCommand(m_hAsyncDBHandle, "BEGIN");
    2942             :         }
    2943             : 
    2944             : #ifdef DEBUG_VERBOSE
    2945             :         CPLDebug("GPKG",
    2946             :                  "AsyncRTreeThreadFunction(): "
    2947             :                  "Processing batch of %d features, "
    2948             :                  "starting at FID " CPL_FRMT_GIB " and ending "
    2949             :                  "at FID " CPL_FRMT_GIB,
    2950             :                  static_cast<int>(aoEntries.size()), aoEntries.front().nId,

    3157             : //----------------------------------------------------------------------
    3158             : // FeatureGenerateUpdateSQL()
    3159             : //
    3160             : // Build a SQL UPDATE statement that references all the columns in
    3161             : // the OGRFeatureDefn that the user asked to be updated, then prepare it for
    3162             : // repeated use in a prepared statement. All statements start off with geometry
    3163             : // (if it exists, and if it is asked to be updated), then reference each column
    3164             : // in the order it appears in the OGRFeatureDefn.
    3165             : // FeatureBindParameters operates on the expectation of this
    3166             : // column ordering.
    3167             : 
    3168             : //
    3169           7 : std::string OGRGeoPackageTableLayer::FeatureGenerateUpdateSQL(
    3170             :     const OGRFeature *poFeature, int nUpdatedFieldsCount,
    3171             :     const int *panUpdatedFieldsIdx, int nUpdatedGeomFieldsCount,
    3172             :     const int * /*panUpdatedGeomFieldsIdx*/) const
    3173             : {
    3174           7 :     bool bNeedComma = false;
    3175           7 :     const OGRFeatureDefn *poFeatureDefn = poFeature->GetDefnRef();
    3176             : 
    3177             :     /* Set up our SQL string basics */
    3178          14 :     std::string osUpdate("UPDATE \"");
    3179           7 :     osUpdate += SQLEscapeName(m_pszTableName);
    3180           7 :     osUpdate += "\" SET ";
    3181             : 
    3182           7 :     if (nUpdatedGeomFieldsCount == 1 && poFeatureDefn->GetGeomFieldCount() > 0)
    3183             :     {
    3184           2 :         osUpdate += '"';
    3185             :         osUpdate +=
    3186           2 :             SQLEscapeName(poFeatureDefn->GetGeomFieldDefn(0)->GetNameRef());
    3187           2 :         osUpdate += "\"=?";
    3188           2 :         bNeedComma = true;
    3189             :     }
    3190             : 
    3191             :     /* Add attribute column names (except FID) to the SQL */
    3192          12 :     for (int i = 0; i < nUpdatedFieldsCount; i++)
    3193             :     {
    3194           5 :         const int iField = panUpdatedFieldsIdx[i];
    3195          10 :         if (iField == m_iFIDAsRegularColumnIndex ||
    3196           5 :             m_abGeneratedColumns[iField])
    3197           0 :             continue;
    3198           5 :         if (!poFeature->IsFieldSet(iField))
    3199           1 :             continue;
    3200           4 :         if (!bNeedComma)
    3201           4 :             bNeedComma = true;
    3202             :         else
    3203           0 :             osUpdate += ", ";
    3204             : 
    3205           4 :         osUpdate += '"';
    3206             :         osUpdate +=
    3207           4 :             SQLEscapeName(poFeatureDefn->GetFieldDefn(iField)->GetNameRef());
    3208           4 :         osUpdate += "\"=?";
    3209             :     }
    3210           7 :     if (!bNeedComma)
    3211           1 :         return CPLString();
    3212             : 
    3213           6 :     osUpdate += " WHERE \"";
    3214           6 :     osUpdate += SQLEscapeName(m_pszFidColumn);
    3215           6 :     osUpdate += "\" = ?";
    3216             : 
    3217           6 :     return osUpdate;
    3218             : }

    4105             : /************************************************************************/
    4106             : /*                      GetExtentFromRTree()                            */
    4107             : /************************************************************************/
    4108             : 
    4109          87 : static bool GetExtentFromRTree(sqlite3 *hDB, const std::string &osRTreeName,
    4110             :                                double &minx, double &miny, double &maxx,
    4111             :                                double &maxy)
    4112             : {
    4113             :     // Cf https://github.com/sqlite/sqlite/blob/master/ext/rtree/rtree.c
    4114             :     // for the description of the content of the rtree _node table
    4115             :     // We fetch the root node (nodeno = 1) and iterates over its cells, to
    4116             :     // take the min/max of their minx/maxx/miny/maxy values.
    4117          87 :     char *pszSQL = sqlite3_mprintf(
    4118             :         "SELECT data FROM \"%w_node\" WHERE nodeno = 1", osRTreeName.c_str());
    4119          87 :     sqlite3_stmt *hStmt = nullptr;
    4120          87 :     CPL_IGNORE_RET_VAL(sqlite3_prepare_v2(hDB, pszSQL, -1, &hStmt, nullptr));
    4121          87 :     sqlite3_free(pszSQL);
    4122          87 :     bool bOK = false;
    4123          87 :     if (hStmt)
    4124             :     {
    4125         174 :         if (sqlite3_step(hStmt) == SQLITE_ROW &&
    4126          87 :             sqlite3_column_type(hStmt, 0) == SQLITE_BLOB)
    4127             :         {
    4128          87 :             const int nBytes = sqlite3_column_bytes(hStmt, 0);
    4129             :             // coverity[tainted_data_return]
    4130             :             const GByte *pabyData =
    4131          87 :                 static_cast<const GByte *>(sqlite3_column_blob(hStmt, 0));
    4132          87 :             constexpr int BLOB_HEADER_SIZE = 4;
    4133          87 :             if (nBytes > BLOB_HEADER_SIZE)
    4134             :             {
    4135          87 :                 const int nCellCount = (pabyData[2] << 8) | pabyData[3];
    4136          87 :                 constexpr int SIZEOF_CELL = 24;  // int64_t + 4 float
    4137          87 :                 if (nCellCount >= 1 &&
    4138          80 :                     nBytes >= BLOB_HEADER_SIZE + SIZEOF_CELL * nCellCount)
    4139             :                 {
    4140          80 :                     minx = std::numeric_limits<double>::max();
    4141          80 :                     miny = std::numeric_limits<double>::max();
    4142          80 :                     maxx = -std::numeric_limits<double>::max();
    4143          80 :                     maxy = -std::numeric_limits<double>::max();
    4144          80 :                     size_t offset = BLOB_HEADER_SIZE;
    4145         205 :                     for (int i = 0; i < nCellCount; ++i)
    4146             :                     {
    4147         125 :                         offset += sizeof(int64_t);
    4148             : 
    4149             :                         float fMinX;
    4150         125 :                         memcpy(&fMinX, pabyData + offset, sizeof(float));
    4151         125 :                         offset += sizeof(float);
    4152         125 :                         CPL_MSBPTR32(&fMinX);
    4153         125 :                         minx = std::min(minx, static_cast<double>(fMinX));
    4154             : 
    4155             :                         float fMaxX;
    4156         125 :                         memcpy(&fMaxX, pabyData + offset, sizeof(float));
    4157         125 :                         offset += sizeof(float);
    4158         125 :                         CPL_MSBPTR32(&fMaxX);
    4159         125 :                         maxx = std::max(maxx, static_cast<double>(fMaxX));
    4160             : 
    4161             :                         float fMinY;
    4162         125 :                         memcpy(&fMinY, pabyData + offset, sizeof(float));
    4163         125 :                         offset += sizeof(float);
    4164         125 :                         CPL_MSBPTR32(&fMinY);
    4165         125 :                         miny = std::min(miny, static_cast<double>(fMinY));
    4166             : 
    4167             :                         float fMaxY;
    4168         125 :                         memcpy(&fMaxY, pabyData + offset, sizeof(float));
    4169         125 :                         offset += sizeof(float);
    4170         125 :                         CPL_MSBPTR32(&fMaxY);
    4171         125 :                         maxy = std::max(maxy, static_cast<double>(fMaxY));
    4172             :                     }
    4173             : 
    4174          80 :                     bOK = true;
    4175             :                 }
    4176             :             }
    4177             :         }
    4178          87 :         sqlite3_finalize(hStmt);
    4179             :     }
    4180          87 :     return bOK;
    4181             : }

    4573             : /************************************************************************/
    4574             : /*                   WorkaroundUpdate1TriggerIssue()                    */
    4575             : /************************************************************************/
    4576             : 
    4577          17 : void OGRGeoPackageTableLayer::WorkaroundUpdate1TriggerIssue()
    4578             : {
    4579             :     // Workaround issue of https://sqlite.org/forum/forumpost/8c8de6ff91
    4580             :     // Basically the official _update1 spatial index trigger doesn't work
    4581             :     // with current versions of SQLite when invoked from an UPSERT statement.
    4582             :     // In GeoPackage 1.4, the update6 and update7 triggers replace update1
    4583             : 
    4584          17 :     if (m_bHasUpdate6And7Triggers || m_poFeatureDefn->GetGeomFieldCount() == 0)
    4585           8 :         return;
    4586             : 
    4587          11 :     const char *pszT = m_pszTableName;
    4588          11 :     const char *pszC = m_poFeatureDefn->GetGeomFieldDefn(0)->GetNameRef();
    4589          11 :     const char *pszI = GetFIDColumn();
    4590             : 
    4591          11 :     CPLString osRTreeName = "rtree_";
    4592          11 :     osRTreeName += pszT;
    4593          11 :     osRTreeName += "_";
    4594          11 :     osRTreeName += pszC;
    4595             : 
    4596             :     // Check if update6 and update7 triggers are there
    4597             :     {
    4598          22 :         char *pszSQL = sqlite3_mprintf(
    4599             :             "SELECT * FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'trigger' "
    4600             :             "AND name IN ('%q', '%q')",
    4601          22 :             (m_osRTreeName + "_update6").c_str(),
    4602          22 :             (m_osRTreeName + "_update7").c_str());
    4603          11 :         auto oResult = SQLQuery(m_poDS->GetDB(), pszSQL);
    4604          11 :         sqlite3_free(pszSQL);
    4605          11 :         if (oResult && oResult->RowCount() == 2)
    4606             :         {
    4607           2 :             m_bHasUpdate6And7Triggers = true;
    4608           2 :             return;
    4609             :         }
    4610             :     }
    4611             : 
    4612             :     char *pszSQL =
    4613           9 :         sqlite3_mprintf("SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'trigger' "
    4614             :                         "AND name = '%q'",
    4615          18 :                         (m_osRTreeName + "_update1").c_str());
    4616           9 :     auto oResult = SQLQuery(m_poDS->GetDB(), pszSQL);
    4617           9 :     sqlite3_free(pszSQL);
    4618           9 :     if (oResult && oResult->RowCount() == 1)
    4619             :     {
    4620           9 :         const char *pszTriggerSQL = oResult->GetValue(0, 0);
    4621           9 :         if (pszTriggerSQL)
    4622             :         {
    4623           9 :             m_osUpdate1Trigger = pszTriggerSQL;
    4624             :         }
    4625             :     }
    4626           9 :     if (m_osUpdate1Trigger.empty())
    4627           0 :         return;
    4628             : 
    4629           9 :     m_bUpdate1TriggerDisabled = true;
    4630             : 
    4631             :     pszSQL =
    4632           9 :         sqlite3_mprintf("DROP TRIGGER \"%w_update1\"", osRTreeName.c_str());
    4633           9 :     SQLCommand(m_poDS->GetDB(), pszSQL);
    4634           9 :     sqlite3_free(pszSQL);
    4635             : 
    4636           9 :     pszSQL = sqlite3_mprintf(
    4637             :         "CREATE TRIGGER \"%w_update6\" AFTER UPDATE OF \"%w\" "
    4638             :         "ON \"%w\" "
    4639             :         "WHEN OLD.\"%w\" = NEW.\"%w\" AND "
    4640             :         "(NEW.\"%w\" NOTNULL AND NOT ST_IsEmpty(NEW.\"%w\")) AND "
    4641             :         "(OLD.\"%w\" NOTNULL AND NOT ST_IsEmpty(OLD.\"%w\")) "
    4642             :         "BEGIN "
    4643             :         "UPDATE \"%w\" SET "
    4644             :         "minx = ST_MinX(NEW.\"%w\"), maxx = ST_MaxX(NEW.\"%w\"),"
    4645             :         "miny = ST_MinY(NEW.\"%w\"), maxy = ST_MaxY(NEW.\"%w\") "
    4646             :         "WHERE id = NEW.\"%w\";"
    4647             :         "END",
    4648             :         osRTreeName.c_str(), pszC, pszT, pszI, pszI, pszC, pszC, pszC, pszC,
    4649             :         osRTreeName.c_str(), pszC, pszC, pszC, pszC, pszI);
    4650           9 :     SQLCommand(m_poDS->GetDB(), pszSQL);
    4651           9 :     sqlite3_free(pszSQL);
    4652             : 
    4653           9 :     pszSQL = sqlite3_mprintf(
    4654             :         "CREATE TRIGGER \"%w_update7\" AFTER UPDATE OF \"%w\" ON "
    4655             :         "\"%w\" "
    4656             :         "WHEN OLD.\"%w\" = NEW.\"%w\" AND "
    4657             :         "(NEW.\"%w\" NOTNULL AND NOT ST_IsEmpty(NEW.\"%w\")) AND "
    4658             :         "(OLD.\"%w\" ISNULL OR ST_IsEmpty(OLD.\"%w\")) "
    4659             :         "BEGIN "
    4660             :         "INSERT INTO \"%w\" VALUES ("

    4662             :         "ST_MinX(NEW.\"%w\"), ST_MaxX(NEW.\"%w\"),"
    4663             :         "ST_MinY(NEW.\"%w\"), ST_MaxY(NEW.\"%w\")"
    4664             :         "); "
    4665             :         "END",

    4667             :         osRTreeName.c_str(), pszI, pszC, pszC, pszC, pszC);
    4668           9 :     SQLCommand(m_poDS->GetDB(), pszSQL);
    4669           9 :     sqlite3_free(pszSQL);

    5733             : /*                        GetColumnsOfCreateTable()                     */
    5734             : /************************************************************************/
    5735             : 
    5736         605 : CPLString OGRGeoPackageTableLayer::GetColumnsOfCreateTable(
    5737             :     const std::vector<OGRFieldDefn *> &apoFields)
    5738             : {
    5739         605 :     CPLString osSQL;
    5740             : 
    5741         605 :     char *pszSQL = nullptr;
    5742         605 :     bool bNeedComma = false;
    5743         605 :     if (m_pszFidColumn != nullptr)
    5744             :     {
    5745             :         pszSQL =
    5746         605 :             sqlite3_mprintf("\"%w\" INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL",
    5747             :                             m_pszFidColumn);
    5748         605 :         osSQL += pszSQL;
    5749         605 :         sqlite3_free(pszSQL);
    5750         605 :         bNeedComma = true;
    5751             :     }
    5752             : 
    5753         605 :     const OGRwkbGeometryType eGType = GetGeomType();
    5754         605 :     if (eGType != wkbNone)
    5755             :     {
    5756         563 :         if (bNeedComma)
    5757             :         {
    5758         563 :             osSQL += ", ";
    5759             :         }
    5760         563 :         bNeedComma = true;
    5761             : 
    5762             :         /* Requirement 25: The geometry_type_name value in a
    5763             :          * gpkg_geometry_columns */
    5764             :         /* row SHALL be one of the uppercase geometry type names specified in */
    5765             :         /* Geometry Types (Normative). */
    5766         563 :         const char *pszGeometryType = m_poDS->GetGeometryTypeString(eGType);
    5767             : 
    5768             :         pszSQL =

    5770         563 :         osSQL += pszSQL;
    5771         563 :         sqlite3_free(pszSQL);
    5772         563 :         if (!m_poFeatureDefn->GetGeomFieldDefn(0)->IsNullable())
    5773             :         {
    5774           2 :             osSQL += " NOT NULL";
    5775             :         }
    5776             :     }
    5777             : 
    5778        2632 :     for (size_t i = 0; i < apoFields.size(); i++)
    5779             :     {
    5780        2027 :         OGRFieldDefn *poFieldDefn = apoFields[i];
    5781             :         // Eg. when a geometry type is specified + an sql statement returns no
    5782             :         // or NULL geometry values, the geom column is incorrectly treated as

    6173             : /*                          RecreateTable()                             */

    6175             : 
    6176             : OGRErr
    6177           6 : OGRGeoPackageTableLayer::RecreateTable(const CPLString &osColumnsForCreate,
    6178             :                                        const CPLString &osFieldListForSelect)
    6179             : {
    6180             :     /* -------------------------------------------------------------------- */
    6181             :     /*      Save existing related triggers and index                        */
    6182             :     /* -------------------------------------------------------------------- */
    6183           6 :     sqlite3 *hDB = m_poDS->GetDB();
    6184             : 
    6185           6 :     char *pszSQL = sqlite3_mprintf(
    6186             :         "SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type IN ('trigger','index') "
    6187             :         "AND lower(tbl_name)=lower('%q') LIMIT 10000",
    6188             :         m_pszTableName);
    6189           6 :     OGRErr eErr = OGRERR_NONE;
    6190           6 :     auto oTriggers = SQLQuery(hDB, pszSQL);
    6191           6 :     sqlite3_free(pszSQL);
    6192             : 
    6193             :     /* -------------------------------------------------------------------- */
    6194             :     /*      Make a temporary table with new content.                        */
    6195             :     /* -------------------------------------------------------------------- */
    6196           6 :     if (oTriggers)
    6197             :     {
    6198           6 :         pszSQL = sqlite3_mprintf("CREATE TABLE \"%w_ogr_tmp\" (%s)",
    6199             :                                  m_pszTableName, osColumnsForCreate.c_str());
    6200           6 :         eErr = SQLCommand(hDB, pszSQL);
    6201           6 :         sqlite3_free(pszSQL);
    6202             :     }
    6203             :     else
    6204             :     {
    6205           0 :         eErr = OGRERR_FAILURE;
    6206             :     }
    6207             : 
    6208           6 :     if (eErr == OGRERR_NONE)
    6209             :     {
    6210           6 :         pszSQL = sqlite3_mprintf(
    6211             :             "INSERT INTO \"%w_ogr_tmp\" SELECT %s FROM \"%w\"", m_pszTableName,
    6212             :             osFieldListForSelect.c_str(), m_pszTableName);
    6213           6 :         eErr = SQLCommand(hDB, pszSQL);
    6214           6 :         sqlite3_free(pszSQL);
    6215             :     }
    6216             : 
    6217             :     /* -------------------------------------------------------------------- */
    6218             :     /*      Drop the original table                                         */

    6225             :     }
    6226             : 
    6227             :     /* -------------------------------------------------------------------- */
